_instructions: Add your work experience here. Copy the experience object for each job.

experiences.title: Sr. Data Engineer
experiences.description: Build and operate Azure-based data platforms that turn raw financial data into curated, model-ready datasets for risk, operations, and analytics teams. Cover the full lifecycle from ingestion pipelines through GenAI-enabled data products and their production releases.
responsibilities: Designed Azure Data Factory pipelines combining SQL, Python, and Azure OpenAI outputs to give risk teams cleaner financial data
Created Databricks workflows with PySpark and Delta Lake to build curated datasets for GenAI search and analytics used by operations teams
Built Synapse models and SQL transformations for model-ready reporting, providing analysts with dependable datasets for business intelligence and experimentation
Improved Azure DevOps releases with Git, Terraform, monitoring, and validation to make GenAI-enabled data products easier to deploy, review, and support in production

experiences.title: Data Engineer
experiences.description: Engineered AWS data pipelines that ingested and processed healthcare datasets for analytics and regulated reporting. Focused on automated, HIPAA-aligned workflows spanning batch and streaming across claims, clinical, and member operations.
responsibilities: Implemented AWS Glue jobs with Spark and Python to process healthcare datasets into S3, Redshift, and Athena for analytics consumption
Engineered Lambda orchestration with Step Functions and IAM to automate ingestion validation, monitoring, and exception handling in HIPAA-aligned production environments
Optimized Redshift models and S3 partitioning with Parquet to accelerate regulated healthcare reporting and improve dataset availability for claims and analytics teams
Streamlined Kinesis and EMR processing with Spark Structured Streaming to deliver timely clinical feeds for governance, analytics, and compliance functions

experiences.title: Associate Data Engineer
experiences.description: Delivered GCP data pipelines and analytics datasets for enterprise consulting clients. Handled ingestion, warehouse modeling, and orchestration through to governed dashboards and reporting.
responsibilities: Automated GCP pipelines with Dataflow, Pub/Sub, and Cloud Storage to deliver scalable analytics datasets for enterprise reporting and decision workflows
Integrated BigQuery marts with SQL, dbt, and Dataform to build governed transformations and reusable analytical models for consulting delivery
Configured Cloud Composer DAGs with Airflow and GitLab CI to schedule ELT workloads and improve observability, alerting, and logging
Validated Looker and Tableau datasets through quality checks, metadata, and lineage practices to increase confidence in dashboards and operational reporting
